name: @retry-now/detect
author: owjs3901
description: Dependency-free capability detector. Inspects a project root and reports which test/lint/benchmark commands are runnable across rust/go/python/node ecosystems.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --packages external && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/index.d.ts src/index.ts --no-check
